title: Viscount (Viscount-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Viscount''-class}} {{Otheruses|Viscount}} {{Citation}} {{IndividualShip |image=[[File:Viscount-profile.jpg]] |name=''Viscount'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line=[[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |model=[[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defender]] |type=[[Star Defender]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=3,000 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=*[[Battlecruiser/Legends|Battlecruiser]] *Technology demonstrator |commission=[[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]][[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] **[[Attacks on Imperial holdouts]] *[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' **[[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]] |affiliation= |navy=*[[New Republic First Fleet|New Republic First Battle Group]] *[[First Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance First Fleet]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|The ''Viscount''. Just commissioned two weeks ago. It must be making a flyby for the approval of the council.''"
"''Wow.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''}} The '''''Viscount''''' was the lead ship of the [[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defender]] line produced for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. ==History== The ''Viscount''{{'s}} design was worked out after the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] when the New Republic military realized the need for more powerful [[Battleship/Legends|dreadnoughts]]. By the time it was finished, [[25 ABY/Legends|twenty-five years after]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], so many [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyers]] had been captured by the New Republic, that the government considered halting construction on more ships. The ''Viscount'' itself was meant to be a prototype for the design and was built as a battlecruiser at three [[Meter/Legends|kilometers]] in length. The subsequent full-scale vessels were 17 kilometer-long [[dreadnought]]s such as the [[Bounty (warship)|''Bounty'']] and the [[Krakana (Viscount-class)|''Krakana'']]. Prior to the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], it [[Attacks on Imperial holdouts|fought rogue Imperial elements]] while the New Republic consolidated power throughout the galaxy, following the official end of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Being the largest and most powerful of all [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]-designed warships, the ''Viscount'' and its sister ships were later put to good use during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invasion. Originally stationed at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the warship was eventually deployed to [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], following the reorganization of the New Republic into the Galactic Alliance. During the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] deployed the ''Viscount'' as part of a trio of heavy warships that included the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']] and the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Harbinger (Mon Calamari Star Cruiser)|''Harbinger'']]. The long-range weapons on the ''Viscount'' were utilized to sow heavy damage on the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] armada. ==Behind the scenes== The ''Viscount'' first appeared in the [[Del Rey]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]] and published on [[October 5]]th, [[1999]].{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/novel/news19991007.html|text=The New Jedi Order: ''Vector Prime''}} While the [[2007]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebook [[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] established a length of seventeen kilometers for the ''Viscount''{{'s}} class, [[2012]]'s ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' specified the ''Viscount'' as an anomalous three-kilometer prototype. [[Paul R. Urquhart]], one of ''Warfare''{{'s}} co-authors, explained this reference as drawing on both [[canon]]ical contradictions and fan debates over the ''Viscount''{{'s}} size, while also reflecting the high degree of variation within [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] classes.{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/25364458982/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-12|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 12}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' ==Sources== *{{SWMiniCite|set=Starship Battles|pack=Mon Calamari Star Defender ''Viscount''}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/rebelraiders|text=Rebel Raiders|int=Rebel Raiders}} *[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] {{Imo}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/25364458982/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-12|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 12}} {{Interlang |de=Schildwall |es=Viscount (clase Viscount) }} [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Alliance]] [[Category:Starships of the New Republic]] [[Category:Viscount-class Star Defenders]]
